description: Attach a Dagster FreshnessPolicy to an asset for continuous SLA monitoring.

asset_key.label: Asset Key
asset_key.description: Asset key to attach the freshness policy to (e.g.

fail_window_hours.label: Fail Window Hours
fail_window_hours.description: [time_window] Hours after which the asset is considered stale and the check fails. Must exceed 1 minute.

warn_window_hours.label: Warn Window Hours
warn_window_hours.description: [time_window] Hours after which a warning is raised. Must be shorter than fail_window_hours.

deadline_cron.label: Deadline Cron
deadline_cron.description: [cron] Cron expression for the materialization deadline (e.g.

lower_bound_delta_hours.label: Lower Bound Delta Hours
lower_bound_delta_hours.description: [cron] How many hours before the deadline the materialization window opens.
